semantic_description: The function reads the first character from a nonempty null-terminated character array described by CharArray::full(s, n + 1, app(l, cons(0, nil))). The precondition requires 1 <= n, Zlength(l) == n, all payload characters are nonzero, and the owned buffer contains l followed by a zero terminator. The implementation has straight-line control flow, returns s[0], and does not modify memory, so the postcondition relates the return value to l[0] while preserving the same CharArray::full resource.
